name: prd-workflow
title: PRD Workflow
job_to_be_done: Move a B-end requirement from evidence-backed alignment through staged writing, independent review, deterministic validation, and final delivery without hiding product decisions or skipping human confirmations.

trigger_surface.description: Orchestrate an end-to-end B-end PRD workflow with write-before alignment, decision ledger, two-phase PRD writing, independent quality review, deterministic content-gate validation, revision, and retrospective improvement proposals. Use when the user asks to write, review, revise, or systematize PRDs through a controlled workflow, especially when they mention PRD 工作流, 写前对齐, 决策账本, 质量门禁, 修订闭环, or skill 复盘. Do not use for a simple one-shot PRD draft only; use a dedicated PRD writer if available. Do not use for a standalone PRD review only; use a dedicated PRD reviewer if available.
should_trigger: The user asks to run an end-to-end PRD workflow.
The user asks for write-before alignment, a decision ledger, gated review, or a revision loop.
The user asks to improve the reusable PRD workflow from a completed task's evidence.
should_not_trigger: The user only wants a one-shot PRD draft.
The user only wants a standalone review of an existing PRD.
The user asks a general product-method question without requesting workflow execution.
edge_cases: If source evidence is insufficient, stop at alignment and ask no more than three high-leverage questions.
If hooks are unavailable, run all required gates inline.
If a reusable-rule change is proposed, require explicit per-patch confirmation.

steps: Load 01_workflow/workflow-manifest.json and initialize the file-backed task.
Execute Node 1 through Node 5 in manifest order.
Apply Node 3 writing contracts only when applicable.
Run an independent Node 4 review and obtain the required human decision.
Run Node 4.5 consistency sweep, seal, validate, and plain-language conclusion.
Deliver only after content gate, final PRD contract, and Run Log validation pass.
decision_points: Node 4 fix and P1 risk-acceptance decision.
Any unsupported product judgment that would change the confirmed direction.
failure_modes: Writing a full PRD before alignment is confirmed.
Treating an assumption as a fact.
Using writer self-review as the final quality gate.
Delivering with a missing, stale, blocked, or incomplete content gate.
Treating optional hooks as a replacement for inline validation.
